scripts.dev:env: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('.env') && fs.existsSync('.env.example')) { fs.copyFileSync('.env.example', '.env'); console.log('Created .env from .env.example'); }"
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @villiers-adam/api exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -F @villiers-adam/api exec prisma db seed
scripts.dev:setup: pnpm dev:env && pnpm dev:infra && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed && pnpm dev
